theme: Editorial Brutalism (Light Mode Default with High-Contrast Dark Accents)

sizes.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-[5rem] tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none

typography.guidelines: Do not use Inter. Use Cabinet Grotesk for high-impact, brutalist headers. Keep letter spacing very tight on massive headers, and wide on small labels (tracking-[0.15em]).

colors.guidelines: High contrast minimal palette. 95% of UI should be Stark White and Pitch Black. Use Accent Red (#D9381E) purely for kinetic triggers like 'Sale' tags or primary checkout buttons.

layouts.hero: Asymmetrical split screen or massive overlapping typography over edge-to-edge images. Do not center everything. Left-align giant typography over a 80vh image.
layouts.product_grid: Bento-style or masonry grid. Avoid perfect 4-column symmetry. Use col-span-2 for featured products to break the rhythm.
layouts.product_detail: Sticky product info on the right, large scrolling image gallery on the left.
layouts.admin_panel: Dense, high-utility border-collapse grid. Use Shadcn components heavily customized to look sharp (0px border radius).

grids.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-1 md:gap-px bg-gray-200 border-collapse. (1px brutalist borders separating sections).

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E5E5E5 everywhere. Define sections using these hard lines instead of shadows.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-none everywhere. Sharp corners emphasize the high-end avant-garde fashion feel.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Remove all soft shadows. Use hard offset shadows (e.g., 4px 4px 0px #0A0A0A) if elevation is needed, but mostly rely on flat borders.
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Solid colors only. No glassmorphism in this theme. Unapologetic stark blocks.

component_name.buttons: Square edges, inverted hover states. E.g., Black bg / White text -> White bg / Black text / 1px Black border on hover.
component_name.cards: No padding cards with image filling top, thin border separating text below. Or text overlaid on image with bg-black/40.

component_path.forms: Use customized Shadcn UI forms, remove standard Vercel roundness. Force square corners.

motion.hover: Instant or very fast transitions (0.15s ease). Hovering product images should reveal alternate angle or slight scale up.
motion.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Staggered reveal for product grid items.
motion.micro: Marquee text for announcements ('FREE SHIPPING ON ORDERS OVER $200') using react-fast-marquee.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure black text on white backgrounds. Use text-white over dark hero images with minimum bg-black/30 overlay.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the marquee and scroll effects.

media.image_treatment: High contrast, slightly desaturated editorial photography. Use grayscale for empty states.
media.aspect_ratios: Portrait (3:4 or 4:5) for all apparel products to maximize vertical screen space on mobile.

3d_libraries.reason: Fashion e-commerce relies heavily on photography. High-res imagery > 3D models here, unless specifically building a 3D shoe viewer.

hero.description: Dynamic motion capture of a fashion model in an avant-garde outfit indoors. Perfect for the main landing page hero.
Artistic portrait of a model in colorful conceptual fashion.

categories.description: A man in casual wear selects from a stylish clothing rack.
Simple and elegant clothing rack display in a minimalist studio.

products.description: White crew neck t-shirt and brown leather boots flat lay.
Hoodie and dark clothing flat lay.
Black leather jacket and dress flat lay.
Top view of stylish black jacket with bag.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the following dependencies: lucide-react, react-fast-marquee, @phosphor-icons/react
Use Phosphor icons (duotone or thin) to match the high-end editorial feel.

For the Landing Page, build an asymmetrical hero layout. Do NOT just center a title and a button over a background image. Have a solid left panel with oversized typography (Cabinet Grotesk) and a right panel showing the hero image.
Implement a marquee banner at the top of the site using react-fast-marquee for announcements.
Product filters on the PLP (Product Listing Page) should be a sticky sidebar or an off-canvas drawer with bold checkboxes and stark typography.
The shopping cart should be a right-side drawer overlay.
Admin panel should feel dense and utilitarian. Use 1px borders for all tables, no rounded corners.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the marketing layouts, but heavily utilize Shadcn for Select, DropdownMenu, Dialog, and Forms in the Admin and Checkout flows.
Avoid generic 'Card' components from Shadcn on the storefront. Use raw divs with 1px borders to create a border-collapse grid look.
Do NOT use Space Grotesk. Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Manrope for body.
DO NOT use a completely transparent background in headers, overlays, or any surface that has content under it. ALWAYS use a solid or glassmorphism background to preserve readability.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style. For this app, use sharp edges (rounded-none).
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
